image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about microbiome metabolites.
Context visual: Microbiome metabolites are tiny compounds produced by bacteria in our gut.
Escalation visual: These metabolites can influence everything from digestion to mood.
Evidence visual: Research shows they can even affect our immune system.
Payoff visual: However, some studies are still preliminary, so stay tuned!
Cta visual: Curious about how your gut health impacts you? Follow for more science-based insights!
